rvps/docs/reference-value-uri.md:76:4. **No default behavior:** The RV identifier is an opaque string to the storage layer. Omitting the tag (e.g. `rvps:///coco/kata/measurements`) and using an explicit `:latest` tag (e.g. `rvps:///coco/kata/measurements:latest`) are **not** equivalent unless an implementation explicitly defines such behavior. Policies and tooling should use the full string they intend to resolve; do not assume that "no tag" implies "latest" or vice versa.
